### Entity Profile

- **Full name:** Agro China Pakistan Pvt Ltd
- **Parent:** Topsun Group Pakistan (agribusiness group est. 2012; Faisalabad/Punjab base)
- **Established:** 2021 (per group website + China customs first entry Jan 2021)
- **Activity:** Imports agrochemicals from China (insecticides, weedicides, fungicides, miticides, bactericides)
- **Trade scale:** 265 China customs records · 60 Chinese suppliers · 88 shipments in 2024 (+577% vs. 2021)
- **CEO:** Muhammad Usman Ali | **COO:** Muhammad Farooq Hasnain

| **Rapid growth** — 577% import growth in 4 years | MEDIUM |
| **Pakistan jurisdiction** | MEDIUM |

### Mandatory EDD Before Onboarding
1. SECP certificate + Form A (directors + UBOs)
2. Chinese supplier list for OFAC/BIS screening
3. Pakistan DRAP pesticide product registrations
4. NTN certificate + FBR active taxpayer status
